case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. TAU NOA ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NOA, TAU AN INDIVIDUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES AS TO DEFENDANT NOA, TAU AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES SERVED DEC-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOA, TAU AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NOA, TAU AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOA, TAU AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER STREET, #80, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON A MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT ; HEARING - 1/27/15 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501, FILED/SERVED - 1/15/15; OPPOSITION - 1/22/15; NO REPLY. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
